positive: A whimsical celestial landscape illustration featuring stylized galaxies, crescent moons, and scattered constellations rendered in a clean, modern silhouette style. The composition should be centered, with major elements overlapping gracefully to create depth. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, cosmic violet, ethereal gold, and matte cream. The style should be highly graphic and vector-art inspired, suitable for printing on dark fabric. Focus on bold, crisp outlines and clean negative space, maximizing visual impact and readability from a distance. Minimalist yet richly detailed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, writing, signature, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, poorly rendered, jpeg artifacts, dull colors, low detail
